scenario_description: 用户逐步把 VS Code 调成 Python 高频开发环境：先改通用设置，再增加快捷键，最后补用户代码片段。整个过程体现连续追加需求而不是一次性下达。

phases.instruction: 先把 VS Code 用户设置里 editor.formatOnSave 打开，再把 editor.tabCompletion 设成 on。
接着在用户 keybindings 里加两个快捷键：Ctrl+Alt+R 用来运行 Python 文件，只有 editorTextFocus 且 editorLangId 是 python 时生效；Ctrl+Alt+S 用来保存全部文件，只有 editorTextFocus 时生效。
最后在 Python 用户 snippets 里加一个 main_guard：prefix 是 mg，body 两行分别是 if __name__ == '__main__': 和四个空格加 ${1:main()}，description 是 Python main guard。同时把 editor.snippetSuggestions 设成 top。

result.command: python -c "import json; from pathlib import Path; s=Path('/home/user/.config/Code/User/settings.json'); k=Path('/home/user/.config/Code/User/keybindings.json'); sn=Path('/home/user/.config/Code/User/snippets/python.json'); ok=s.exists() and k.exists() and sn.exists(); settings=json.loads(s.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if ok else {}; keybindings=json.loads(k.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if ok else []; snippets=json.loads(sn.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if ok else {}; has=lambda key,cmd,when:any(item.get('key')==key and item.get('command')==cmd and item.get('when')==when for item in keybindings); body=snippets.get('main_guard', {}).get('body'); ok=ok and settings.get('editor.formatOnSave') is True and settings.get('editor.tabCompletion')=='on' and settings.get('editor.snippetSuggestions')=='top' and has('ctrl+alt+r','python.execInTerminal','editorTextFocus && editorLangId == python') and has('ctrl+alt+s','workbench.action.files.saveAll','editorTextFocus') and snippets.get('main_guard', {}).get('prefix')=='mg' and body==["if __name__ == '__main__':","    ${1:main()}"] and snippets.get('main_guard', {}).get('description')=='Python main guard'; print('PASS' if ok else 'FAIL')"
